description: Very tiny note in Arabic script, in the same type of hand as many of the early 5th/11th century tax receipts. Some contain the mystery glyph (backwards ط). All are dated after the formula kutiba. ENA 3971.13–24, 31 and 34.
tags: tax, Arabic script, tax receipt, glyph, DIMME
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
